_meta.scope: deployed-20, web-validatable (validated+doable), one export per factor
_meta.status_legend: pending → done(✅ parity) / diverged(✗ real gap) / blocked / skipped
procedure_per_factor: 1. 果仁 web: rank-ONLY on this single indicator, universe to match (or a broad universe — factor VALUES are 范围/universe-invariant), 选股日期 ≤ local calendar max.
2. 导出 → rename 果仁_{date}_{universe}_{indicator}.xlsx under Knowledge/果仁验证因子/.
3. derive/confirm the local_expr (validated rows already have it; doable rows: map the 果仁_formula → local qlib expr via guorn_local_field_mapping.md conventions).
5. record status/verdict here (re-run this script preserves it).

factors.guorn_formula: (refq(CoreProfitQ,0)-refq(CoreProfitQ,4))/abs(refq(CoreProfitQ,4))
factors.verdict: ✅ penny/display-exact (median 0.0061%, Spearman 0.994, Pearson 0.998); selection top-5/10/20 = 100%/100%/100% (no ⚠); derived expr from validated CoreProfitQ components reproduces 果仁 exactly
factors.export_file: 果仁_20251231_排除ST排除科创_排名-CoreProfitQGrPY.xlsx

factors.guorn_formula: 净资产收益率-RefQ(净资产收益率,1)
factors.verdict: ✗ SELECTION-DIVERGED — top-K re-test (2026-06-28, rigorous comparator): top-5/10/20 = 20%/40%/35%, Spearman 0.857, sign 60%, Pearson 0.052. Best build (TTM归母/end-eq QoQ diff). 净资产收益率 LEVEL reproducible but the diff is negative-equity-fragile (果仁 #1=000692 eq −1.29亿→333). NOT verification-complete (top-K fails the gate); book-level immaterial (1/16 weight).
factors.export_file: 果仁_20251231_排除ST排除科创_排名-ROETTMDiffPQ.xlsx

factors.verdict: ◑ top-K NOT ASSESSABLE at 2025-12-31 — only 10/4412 stocks have an active 业绩预告 at year-end (2025-annual forecasts are issued Jan 2026, mandatory by Jan-31), so the factor is inherently sparse pre-season → cov 0.2%, can't compute a meaningful top-K. VALUE was validated at rung-3 (38,252 holdings across dates, median 4.4e-05). To assess top-K, re-export at a forecast-dense date (late Jan/Feb 2026). $forecast__np_q_yoy is a sparse forecast-issuer sub-universe factor (gate on non-null).

✅ REPRODUCED via caliber (my earlier 'irreducible' verdict was WRONG). 果仁 股息率TTM = Σ declared cash div (税前 cash_div_tax, most-finalized amount, ANN-date 预案 TTM window, PIT ann≤signal) / raw close. Validated 2025-12-31: median 0.52% rel (isolated on 果仁 price), top-5/10 100%, Spearman 0.992; on local close top-5 100%/top-20 90%. $dv_ttm (ex-date REALIZED) matches the BULK (0.70% med) but diverges at the high-yield TAIL/selection: counts announced-not-yet-ex (600329 2.450) + drops old-announcement-ex'd (603167 0.220). Helper: guorn_dividend_caliber.py.
factors.export_file: 果仁_20251231_排除ST排除科创_排名-股息率TTM.xlsx
factors.note: CALIBER applies to ALL dividend factors (DivGrPY% Div%NetIncY2 近三年分红之和 预期股息率)

(2) 2008 data-start cap (trade_cal+day.txt both begin 2008-01-02): 1299 pre-2008 names pinned local=4376 vs 果仁 4400-8453 → oldest-name top-K unrecoverable. Clean case (post-2008, no suspension) local==果仁 exact. 1 book. 果仁_20251231_排除ST排除科创_排名-交易天数.xlsx

Causes: (1) opaque 果仁 caliber — trailing -1 + an EPS/TTM definition the 2-line display can't reveal (no clean TTM-EPS-YoY gives 茅台 -198%); (2) unstable near-zero denominator — 67% of names |value|>100%, 果仁 range -1044..+12417 → ranks noise-driven. NOTE: runbook's 'value reproduces (BYD -34/恒瑞 +35)' was measuring MY expr's OWN values, not a 果仁 match. 1 book, don't chase. export col EpsTTMGr% in 果仁_20251231_排除ST排除科创_排名-ATRN50+EpsTTMGr.xlsx
